zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱，短线等待方向选择
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD报价6.006，价格运行于SMA(20)均线6.01455附近，表明短期趋势仍处于整理阶段。24小时涨幅仅0.21%，多空力量相对均衡，但价格未能有效站稳均线，整体结构仍偏弱势震荡。

从技术指标来看，MACD数值为-0.0744，处于零轴下方，显示中期动能依然偏空。虽然空头优势存在，但跌幅有所收敛，短线存在技术性反弹需求。由于RSI数据缺失，当前需重点关注价格行为及成交量变化确认方向。

支撑方面，近期低点5.9942构成首要支撑区域，若失守则可能进一步下探5.95附近。上方阻力首先位于6.06一线，其次关注6.10整数关口。只有突破并站稳6.06至6.10区域，市场情绪才有望逐步转强。

交易策略上，激进投资者可关注6.00附近支撑有效性进行短线低吸，但需严格设置止损。稳健交易者建议等待价格重新站上SMA(20)并伴随MACD拐头向上后再考虑跟进。整体而言，当前仍以区间震荡思路为主，追涨操作风险较高。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently consolidating within a very tight intraday range around the $6.00 psychological level, showing a lack of decisive momentum. Price action remains slightly below the 20-period SMA at 6.01455, suggesting mild short-term weakness. The broader structure is neutral to slightly bearish, as repeated failures to sustain levels above $6.06 indicate fading bullish follow-through and ongoing market indecision here.

MACD at -0.0744 suggests bearish momentum building despite the absence of a confirmed signal line reading. This negative histogram reading indicates that downside pressure is slightly outweighing upside attempts in the short term. With RSI unavailable, momentum confirmation is limited, but price behavior near the SMA hints at weakening bullish strength and a potential drift toward lower consolidation zones if buying volume does not improve conditions ahead.

Immediate support is located near $5.9942, aligning with the daily low, followed by stronger psychological support around $5.95 and $5.90. On the upside, resistance is clustered at the 20-SMA near 6.01455, with stronger rejection observed at $6.0642, the session high. A sustained breakout above this level would be required to re-establish bullish momentum and open room toward higher resistance zones.

Short-term strategy favors range trading between support near $5.99 and resistance around $6.06. Buying interest may be considered near the lower boundary with tight risk control below $5.95. Alternatively, traders may wait for a confirmed breakout above $6.06 to target continuation toward $6.10 and beyond. Until volatility expands, disciplined position sizing and quick profit-taking remain essential in this low-momentum environment for improved execution timing.
